case_title: JORGE JUAREZ MARTINEZ VS. JOSEPH YOUSEF DABIT

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DABIT, JOSEPH YOUSEF AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ACME BURGERHAUS
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY (FILING FEE PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JORGE JUAREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DABIT, JOSEPH YOUSEF AN INDIVIDUAL DBA ACME BURGERHAUS $4,602.80 PRINCIPAL, $22.70 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,850.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
